title: platanthera bulbinella
intro: Platanthera bulbinella, also known as the lesser green orchid or green wood orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platanthera bulbinella are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
